files.content:
PharmaDirect
Service Medicines How It Works Help
Service Medicines How It Works Help
Free Delivery

Medications
Delivered Fast

Upload your prescription. Get medicines delivered in 30 minutes. 24/7 pharmacist support. Licensed & verified.

1M+

Customers

30 min

Delivery

Why Choose PharmaDirect

Lightning Fast

30-minute delivery or less. Same-day pharmacy service.

Secure & Safe

Licensed pharmacists verify all prescriptions. Licensed facility.

Affordable

Best prices guaranteed. Insurance accepted.

24/7 Support

Pharmacist consultation always available. Chat or call.

Popular Medicines

Pain Relief

Ibuprofen, Aspirin, Paracetamol and more

Cold & Cough

Antihistamines, Decongestants, Syrups

Vitamins

Vitamin D, B Complex, Zinc, Iron

Simple 3-Step Process

1

Upload Prescription

Take a photo of your prescription and upload it to our app or website.

2

Confirm & Pay

Our pharmacist verifies your prescription. Pay securely online or cash on delivery.

3

Get Delivered

Medicines arrive at your door in 30 minutes or less. Track your order in real-time.

Questions?

Yes, we are a licensed pharmacy with board-certified pharmacists. All prescriptions verified before dispatch.
We also sell OTC medicines without prescriptions. Video consultation with doctors available for prescriptions.
Yes, we accept most major health insurance plans. Show your insurance card at checkout.

Get Your Medicines Now

30-minute delivery. Verified pharmacists. 24/7.
